/usr/bin/c++ -std=c++17 -fno-omit-frame-pointer -ffp-contract=off  -moutline-atomics -march=armv8-a+crc -Wall -Wextra -Wformat-security -Wvla -Wundef -Wmissing-format-attribute -Woverloaded-virtual -Wcast-qual -Wimplicit-fallthrough=5 -Wstringop-truncation -Wsuggest-override -Wmissing-include-dirs -Wextra-semi -Wlogical-op -Werror -DSAFE_MUTEX -DENABLED_DEBUG_SYNC -g  -Wl,--build-id=sha1 CMakeFiles/mysql_tzinfo_to_sql.dir/time_zone_common.cc.o CMakeFiles/mysql_tzinfo_to_sql.dir/mysql_tzinfo_to_sql.cc.o -o ../runtime_output_directory/mysql_tzinfo_to_sql  ../archive_output_directory/libmysys.a ../archive_output_directory/libstrings.a ../archive_output_directory/libmysys.a ../archive_output_directory/libstrings.a ../archive_output_directory/libmytime.a ../archive_output_directory/libzlib.a ../archive_output_directory/libzstd.a -lm /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so ../archive_output_directory/libbacktrace.a
